PORT.description: Port the Open WebUI service listens on inside the container

WEBUI_SECRET_KEY.description: Signs session cookies and JWTs. Auto-generated at deploy. Do not edit.

WEBSITE_HOSTNAME.description: Public URL of this deployment. Leave empty at deploy, then set from the Variables tab after first launch.

DEFAULT_MODELS.description: Comma-separated model IDs shown in chat picker (e.g. llama3.1:latest,gpt-4o)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: API key for OpenAI, OpenRouter, Groq, or any compatible provider

OPENAI_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible API (default: https://api.openai.com/v1)
